name: hospital_ward_surge_nurse_ratio_marrowbridge_02
premise: Tele-ICU coverage ends at midnight; rural spoke hospitals are asking for a protocol exception to keep higher-acuity patients locally. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around hospital ward surge nurse ratio marrowbridge has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. OR block time and blood-bank release rules create a hard decision point before the next trauma activation window. The trade is not abstract: it is care versus fairness under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Rosa Kim
agents.identity: I am Rosa Kim, the accountable executive on this bridge in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Advisor Samira Haddad
agents.identity: I am Advisor Samira Haddad, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of fairness.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of care even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Rosa Kim must choose under care versus fairness. What does Rosa Kim do?
